title: Gen Imports GAR4858 Cotton Lantern String Lights | Weather Resistant | Warm White | Battery operated | 10pcs, Brown
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Battery Operated String Lights Warm White, 10 pcs.
MODERN DESIGN: These String Lights have a modern design that brings elegance and style to any space.
USE ANYWHERE: Add style and cosiness to any garden with these cotton string lights.
MATERIAL: These String Lights are made of fine materials that are built to last.

COST EFFECTIVE: A cost-effective and energy-saving option to illuminate your garden. Batteries are not included and are required to operate the lights. Includes 10 lights with warm white light, the wire length is 2.85cm.
description: Our Solar Vintage Light Bulb are weather-resistant and will offer a subtle glow.
